en: No reward. Session was below the reward threshold.
zh_TW: 沒有獎勵。專注時間未達獎勵門檻。
+{focus_points} 專注點數  +{xp} 經驗  +{bond} 羈絆
任務獎勵：+{focus_points} 專注點數  +{xp} 經驗

en: Nice work. Look away from the screen and let your eyes rest for a moment.
zh_TW: 做得好。把視線從螢幕移開，讓眼睛休息一下。

en: Take a slow breath. You have already moved the day forward.
zh_TW: 慢慢深呼吸。你已經讓今天往前推進了。

en: Stretch your shoulders before the next round. I will keep the room quiet.
zh_TW: 下一輪之前伸展一下肩膀。我會讓房間保持安靜。

en: If you need water this is the right time.
zh_TW: 如果需要喝水，現在正是時候。

en: Relax your jaw and let your hands rest.
zh_TW: 放鬆下巴，也讓雙手休息一下。

en: Blink a few times and soften your focus.
zh_TW: 眨幾下眼睛，讓視線放柔。

en: You kept the promise to yourself for this round.
zh_TW: 這一輪你守住了對自己的承諾。

en: Let the room stay quiet for a little longer.
A small pause can make the next start easier.
zh_TW: 短短停一下，下一次開始會更容易。

en: Stand up if you can and let your back reset.
zh_TW: 可以的話站起來，讓背部重新放鬆。

en: The daylight is still with us. Take it in for a moment.
zh_TW: 白天的光還在，稍微感受一下。

en: The evening light is softer now. Slow down with it.
zh_TW: 傍晚的光變柔了，也跟著慢下來。

en: It is late. Keep this break gentle.
zh_TW: 時間晚了，這次休息放輕一點。

en: The cloudy room feels calm enough for a quiet reset.
zh_TW: 陰天的房間很安靜，適合重新整理一下。

en: That was a steady round. I noticed.
zh_TW: 剛才那輪很穩，我有注意到。

en: You are getting better at returning to the work.
zh_TW: 你越來越擅長回到工作裡了。

en: I will keep watch while you rest your eyes.
zh_TW: 你休息眼睛時，我會在旁邊看著。

en: You do not have to rush back. The next step can wait a minute.
zh_TW: 不用急著回去，下一步可以等一分鐘。

en: Even a difficult round still counts as showing up.
zh_TW: 就算這輪很不容易，也算是你有出席。

en: That went well. Let the good feeling settle before the next one.
zh_TW: 剛才很順，讓這份感覺沉一下再開始下一輪。

en: Take a short break. I will be here for the next round.
zh_TW: 短暫休息一下。我會在這裡陪你進入下一輪。

en: I am here. Keep an easy rhythm.
zh_TW: 我在這裡。保持輕鬆的節奏。

en: One calm step at a time.
The timer is moving. You only need to stay with this moment.
zh_TW: 計時器正在前進。你只需要留在這一刻。

en: The room is quiet enough for the next few minutes.
zh_TW: 接下來幾分鐘，房間會保持安靜。
傍晚的工作也可以放輕一點。

en: It is late. Keep the pace kind.
zh_TW: 時間晚了，讓步調溫和一點。

en: You are settling into this well.
I will keep the space steady while you work.
zh_TW: 你工作時，我會讓這裡保持穩定。

en: I am here. Keep an easy rhythm.
zh_TW: 我在這裡。保持輕鬆的節奏。
請將 .ogg .mp3 或 .wav 檔放到 res://assets/music
要花費 {focus_points} 專注點數購買 {name} 嗎？

en: Reset and try another focus round.
zh_TW: 重設後再開始一輪專注。
